SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-14-2022 - CONTINUED FOR ADDITIONAL EVIDENCE TO JUN-13-2022 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF LUCAS CHAMBERLIN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT IS NOT PRESENT. REMARK: RETURN MAIL RECD 9/16/21-CONTINUE ORDER MAILED TO ALBERTO RAFAEL GONGORA-INSUFICIENT ADDRESS/RETURN TO SENDER

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-12-2021 - CONTINUED FOR ADDITIONAL EVIDENCE TO JAN-14-2022 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF LUCAS CHAMBERLAIN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ALBERTO RAFAEL GONGORA IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF MUST FILE A CLAIM WITH THE CALIFORNIA VICTIM COMPENSATION BOARD (CALVCB)AND CONTACT THE SF DISTRICT ATTORNEY VICTIM SERVICES DIVISION / UNIT, WHICH ASSISTS VICTIMS WITH THE PROCESSING OF THEIR VICTIM COMPENSATION CLAIMS AND ANY LOSSES THAT ARE CRIME RELATED. THE SFDA VICTIM SERVICES UNIT CONTACT INFORMATION IS: 350 RHODE ISLAND STREET, 400N, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94103. TEL: 628-652-4100 FAX: 628-652-4001. EMAIL: VICTIMSERVICES@SFGOV.ORG. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SMALL CLAIMS - CONTINUE ORDER (FOR JAN-14-2022 HEARING DATE) RETURNED. SENT TO: DEFENDANT - ALBERTO RAFAEL GONGORA (ENVELOPE MARKED:RETURNED TO SENDER - ATTEMPTED - NOT KNOWN - UNABLE TO FORWARD)
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE CLAIM HEARING OF JUN-13-2022 OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL FILED
